post.message: LLM judge reported the PR title claims a fix that the changed non-test code does not plausibly exercise. Deterministic checks did not fire, but the judge's reading of intent vs. diff disagrees.
post.judgeRationale: The PR title refers to fleshing out an episode about mentoring successors, but the diff only modifies a Markdown documentation file (`find-kanpe.md`) and contains no source code changes.
